results.evidence: startDynamicHeartbeat returns { update, stop } — sse-helpers.ts:71-90, test sse-helpers.test.ts:21-27
update() mutates currentPhase/currentMessage and emits immediately — sse-helpers.ts:72-82, test sse-helpers.test.ts:44-55,57-71
stop() nulls timer via clearInterval guard — sse-helpers.ts:84-88, test sse-helpers.test.ts:73-80
withHeartbeat unchanged at sse-helpers.ts:98-123, regression tests sse-helpers.test.ts:130-163
onProgress fires 'generating_skill' before first client.generate — comparator.ts:70, test comparator.test.ts:168-175
onProgress fires 'generating_baseline' before second client.generate — comparator.ts:72, test comparator.test.ts:177-183
onProgress fires 'scoring' before scoreComparison — comparator.ts:141, test comparator.test.ts:205-227
Optional chaining onProgress?.() — no error without callback. Test comparator.test.ts:195-202,229-242. All 9 pre-existing tests pass.
heartbeat initialized with 'generating_skill' — api-routes.ts:522-525. comparator callback fires update on phase change.
comparator fires onProgress('generating_baseline') which triggers heartbeat.update — comparator.ts:72, api-routes.ts:530
comparator fires onProgress('scoring') which triggers heartbeat.update — comparator.ts:141, api-routes.ts:530
heartbeat.stop() called in success path (api-routes.ts:532) and error path (api-routes.ts:589). Idempotent stop via null guard.
Mutable currentPhase/currentMessage in closure — interval tick reads current values. Test sse-helpers.test.ts:57-71
spinnerPhases Set includes generating_skill, generating_baseline, scoring — ProgressLog.tsx:18
accentPhases Set includes generating_skill, generating_baseline, scoring — ProgressLog.tsx:23
ComparisonPage accumulates progress events into progressEntries array (lines 77-87) and renders ProgressLog (line 314-318)
ProgressLog receives isRunning={running} prop — spinner stops when running=false (ComparisonPage.tsx:317)
Progress entries include eval_id from SSE data (ComparisonPage.tsx:80). Per-case heartbeat created/stopped in the loop (api-routes.ts:522-532,589).
